name: healpix-tile-map-viewer
description: High-resolution HEALPix tile map viewer prototype.

scripts.generate:spectral:8192: python3 tools/make_spherical_harmonic_noise.py --output public/datasets/spectral-noise-n8192 --nside 8192 --min-order 11 --tile-size 256 --lmax-factor 1.0 --force && npm run register:dataset -- --id spectral-noise-n8192 --title "Spherical harmonic noise nside 8192" --manifest spectral-noise-n8192/manifest.json --default
scripts.generate:particle-mixing-demo: python3 tools/make_particle_mixing_demo.py --output data/particle-mixing-demo.zarr --base-order 8 --particle-order 11 --particles-per-cell 16 --force && npm run convert:particles -- --input data/particle-mixing-demo.zarr --cell-array cell --value-array mixing_ratio --particle-order 11 --aggregation mean --min-order 7 --max-order 11 --tile-size 128 --output public/datasets/particle-mixing-demo --dataset-id particle-mixing-demo --title "Particle mixing ratio demo" --layer-id mixing_ratio --layer-title "Mean mixing ratio" --default-view globe --colormap viridis --scale linear --force && npm run register:dataset -- --id particle-mixing-demo --title "Particle mixing ratio demo" --manifest particle-mixing-demo/manifest.json
scripts.generate:earth:1024: python3 tools/make_earth_elevation.py --source data/ETOPO_2022_v1_60s_N90W180_bed.nc --output public/datasets/earth-elevation-n1024 --nside 1024 --min-order 8 --tile-size 256 --tile-dtype uint16 --quantize-min -12000 --quantize-max 9000 --force && npm run register:dataset -- --id earth-elevation-n1024 --title "Earth elevation nside 1024" --manifest earth-elevation-n1024/manifest.json
scripts.generate:earth:8192: python3 tools/make_earth_elevation.py --source data/ETOPO2022_15s_surface/ETOPO_2022_v1_15s_surface.vrt --output public/datasets/earth-elevation-n8192 --nside 8192 --min-order 11 --tile-size 256 --tile-dtype uint16 --quantize-min -12000 --quantize-max 9000 --force && npm run register:dataset -- --id earth-elevation-n8192 --title "Earth elevation nside 8192" --manifest earth-elevation-n8192/manifest.json
scripts.generate:zarr-tile-demo: python3 tools/make_zarr_tile_demo.py --force && npm run register:dataset -- --id zarr-tile-demo --title "Zarr tile cache demo" --manifest zarr-tile-demo/manifest.json
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:wasm
